subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the blessed Tree! Many letters were dispatched, and now too, with thoughts and remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه مکاتیب متعدده ارسال گشت و حال نیز بذکر و فکر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
